svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="YAT scenario authoring" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="acct-baseline-singleaz" name="YAT — Ledgerline (Accounting) baseline, single-AZ"> <mxGraphModel dx="1640" dy="1536" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1700" pageHeight="1120" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="YAT Network Topology — Ledgerline (Accounting & Office Administration) in AWS, single-AZ baseline; internal, staff-only over the campus VPN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1620" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;" value="Legend
━━━ Staff access: campus → Site-to-Site VPN → internal ALB (HTTPS:443)
┄┄┄ Egress only: EC2 → NAT gateway → internet gateway → internet (patching). No inbound path to the app.
┄┄┄ AD / LDAPS authentication + management over the VPN
Security groups: sg-alb → sg-app → sg-db (least-privilege, chained tier-to-tier)
Dashed boxes = AWS subnets (single-AZ baseline; matching -b subnets in a second AZ added when HA-hardened)
* EC2 instance type = implementer decision" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="640" x="40" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="internet" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=13;" value="Internet
(egress only — patching)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="170" x="760" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2svpn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Site-to-Site VPN
Campus ↔ AWS
staff access + AD/LDAPS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="520" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="campuszone" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E0F2F1;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="Campus Network (on-premises)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="600" width="470" x="40" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="campussw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#B2DFDB;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=12;" value="Campus Switch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="38" width="280" x="130" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Controller
AD / DNS (LDAPS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="70" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bastion" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="MTS Bastion (admin)
RDP 3389 — implementer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="290" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Finance & Office Administration staff
Ledgerline users (AD-joined desktops)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="420" x="70" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_dc" edge="1" parent="1" source="campussw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="dc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_bastion" edge="1" parent="1" source="campussw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="bastion"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_staff" edge="1" parent="1" source="campussw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="staff"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_s2s" edge="1" parent="1" source="campussw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;strokeWidth=2;" target="s2svpn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="awsregion" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="AWS Region — ap-southeast-2 (Sydney)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="800" width="1120" x="540" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;" value="VPC 10.0.0.0/16 · DNS resolution + VPC flow logs enabled" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="710" width="1070" x="570" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="igw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontSize=11;" value="Internet Gateway
(egress only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="190" x="600" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vgw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=11;" value="VPN Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="1440" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_int_igw" edge="1" parent="1" source="igw" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#BF360C;dashed=1;" target="internet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="845" y="280" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_s2s_vgw" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2svpn" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="vgw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pubsub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Public Subnet public-egress-a
10.0.1.0/24 (ap-southeast-2a) · route → IGW" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1030" x="600" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="natgw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;" value="NAT Gateway
(outbound patching only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="220" x="630" y="512" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appsub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Private Subnet private-app-a
10.0.11.0/24 (ap-southeast-2a) · route → NAT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1030" x="600" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;" value="Internal Application Load Balancer
HTTPS:443 — staff-only, via the VPN
sg-alb" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="300" x="630" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;" value="EC2 — Ledgerline application
Windows Server 2016 (m6i.large*)
Auto Scaling Group (min 1 / max 2)
⚠ single-AZ baseline — not HA
sg-app" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="400" x="1000" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="datasub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBEE;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Private Subnet private-data-a
10.0.21.0/24 (ap-southeast-2a) · no internet route" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1030" x="600" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rds" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;" value="Amazon RDS for SQL Server
single-AZ baseline ⚠ not HA
sg-db" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="340" x="630" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_vgw_alb" edge="1" parent="1" source="vgw" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=10;" target="alb" value="staff HTTPS:443"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_alb_ec2" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=10;" target="ec2" value="443"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ec2_rds" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=10;" target="rds" value="SQL 1433"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ec2_nat" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="natgw" value="egress"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_nat_igw" edge="1" parent="1" source="natgw" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;" target="igw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ec2_vgw" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="vgw" value="AD / LDAPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1618px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: YAT Network Topology — Ledgerline (Accounting & Office Administration) in AWS, single-AZ baseline; internal, staff-only over the campus VPN

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(189, 189, 189), rgb(75, 75, 75));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 628px; height: 1px; padding-top: 53px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Legend
━━━ Staff access: campus → Site-to-Site VPN → internal ALB (HTTPS:443)
┄┄┄ Egress only: EC2 → NAT gateway → internet gateway → internet (patching). No inbound path to the app.
┄┄┄ AD / LDAPS authentication + management over the VPN
Security groups: sg-alb → sg-app → sg-db (least-privilege, chained tier-to-tier)
Dashed boxes = AWS subnets (single-AZ baseline; matching -b subnets in a second AZ added when HA-hardened)
* EC2 instance type = implementer decision
